report.summary: HEAD unchanged at 3b2dd28. 4 new learn guides added to PUBLISHED_PAGES (uncommitted). 91 uncommitted files — deploy gap now 1+ day. No new regressions detected.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 core API routes present on disk: prices, fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, defi-yields
Cache TTLs verified: prices (60s), fear-greed (600s), trending (300s), market-metrics (60s), market-dominance (300s), defi-yields (300s)
Cache-Control + stale-while-revalidate headers configured on all 6 routes
Fallback data present: prices ✓, market-dominance ✓ (full FALLBACK_DATA object)
Fallback data MISSING: fear-greed ✗, trending ✗, market-metrics ✗ — will return 500 on upstream failure
defi-yields fallback gap persists — no graceful degradation on DefiLlama failure (P1 persistent)
Rate limiter coverage: 0/6 public data routes protected — persistent gap
Cannot verify live API responses — sandbox egress blocks degen0x.com

sections.title: Project Manager
items: This cycle: 4 learn guides promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES (uncommitted) — euler-v2 modular lending, hyperlane interoperability, crypto staking, flash loans DeFi

Attention needed from Jefe: growing uncommitted file count (91) and 1+ day deploy gap — recommend commit + deploy cycle
